Off Calendar Dec-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Assistant District Attorney, Rebecca D. Wagner of the San Francisco District Attorney's Office (415.553.4997) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger B. Mead; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)

Off Calendar Sep-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Raymond Fong, of the Office of the District Attorney, Tel. 415.553.1752, for petitioners;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council is granted.
